Key Features

Academics Management

Manage courses, departments, faculties, and academic sessions

Student & Staff Portal

Comprehensive portal for students, lecturers, and administrators

Learning Management

LMS with course materials, assignments, and discussions

Analytics & Reporting

Customizable Grading
